steps.title: Locate the intersection point on the graph
steps.content: The solution to this system is the point where the line and parabola meet. Examining the graph, these two curves intersect at exactly one point.

steps.title: Read the coordinates from the grid
steps.content: From the intersection point, the $x$-coordinate is 4 and the $y$-coordinate is 5. The solution is $(4, 5)$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
